'''Onicrop K'Cin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] engineer and criminal affiliated with the [[Galactic Podracing Mechanics' Union]]. He had a bounty on his head placed by the [[Trade Federation Recruitment Center]] for stealing sensitive [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] encryption codes. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], they learned that he was hiding within [[Outland Transit Station]] and using his expertise at forging identities to earn a living. [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] claimed K'Cin's [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] sometime after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Behind the scenes==
Onicrop is located in the second level of Chapter One, and is the second bounty the player encounters. He is worth 1,500 credits alive and 750 dead.

His name is the reverse of [[LucasArts]] employee Nick Porcino, who worked on ''Bounty Hunter.''

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
